title: Meet Yang Zhilin, the CEO and founder behind China's buzzy new Kimi K3 AI model
excerpt: Yang Zhilin is the CEO and founder of Moonshot AI, a Chinese startup that developed Kimi K3. The Kimi K3 model raised eyebrows in Silicon Valley.
content_html:
By Lakshmi Varanasi

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

There's a founder making waves in the AI industry that's not an American tech billionaire like Elon Musk, Sam Altman, or Dario Amodei.

Yang Zhilin is the 34-year-old researcher and entrepreneur behind the Chinese company Moonshot AI and its new open-weight Kimi K3 AI model, which seized Silicon Valley's attention this week.

Kimi K3 is the latest buzzy open-weight model from China. Its coding and agentic capabilities rival those of leading American models from labs like OpenAI and Anthropic and come at a much lower cost, marking a new milestone for China in the AI race.

Who is Yang Zhilin?

Yang was born in 1992 in Shantou, a city in China's Guangdong province. He attended Tsinghua University before earning a Ph.D. at Carnegie Mellon University in Pennsylvania, where he studied under prominent AI researchers Ruslan Salakhutdinov and William Cohen.

"He is absolutely brilliant," Salakhutdinov said of Yang in a post on X on Friday. In another post, Salakhutdinov said that after his graduation, Yang was heavily recruited by Big Tech but was committed to starting his own company.

While at Carnegie Mellon, Yang interned at Google Brain and Meta. He's also coauthored several research papers on topics ranging from limitations in how language models handle context to prompt-tuning advice.

Before launching Moonshot AI, Yang returned to China and contributed to several major AI projects, including Huawei's PanGu model and the Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence's Wu Dao, a large-scale multimodal AI model. He also cofounded Recurrent AI, a startup that used artificial intelligence to analyze sales conversations and help companies improve their performance.

One of Yang's principles in building AI is to lean toward scale.

"If you can solve it with scale, don't solve it with a new algorithm. The new algorithm's value is to enable better scaling," he told journalist Xiaojun Zhang in an interview published on LinkedIn.

He helped start Moonshot AI in early 2023. The team behind the company had developed multiple AI technologies, including Transformer-XL, RoPE, Group Normalization, ShuffleNet, MuonClip, and Mooncake.

Moonshot AI's first claim to fame was giving its Kimi K2 foundation model an unusually large context window — a trillion parameters — to process lengthy documents. Moonshot also has an AI assistant product, Kimi, and has since expanded into coding, research, and autonomous AI agents, attracting backing from Alibaba, Tencent, and other major Chinese investors.

Kimi K3 has now catapulted both Moonshot AI and its founder onto the global stage.

Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch said Kimi K3 marked "the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark," in a post on X. While Wharton professor Ethan Mollick called it "closest to the frontier yet."

"The ultimate AGI company will dwarf today's giants — double, triple the scale. Not necessarily OpenAI, but such a company will exist," Yang said in his interview with Zhang.

Why Yan Zhilin left the US

Some leading tech figures lamented after Kimi K3's release this week that Yang didn't remain in the United States to work at an American AI lab. Legendary billionaire investor Vinod Khosla blamed the Trump administration's restrictive immigration policies.

"Even bigger issue is the brilliant talent we are scaring away from other countries with our immigration policies for great talent," he said in response to the news of Kimi K3's success.

The Trump administration has moved to tighten immigration restrictions, including for student visas. Last year, the government introduced a $100,000 fee for employers sponsoring some new H-1B applications for foreign workers. The ruling was later struck down by a federal judge and remains in litigation.

Then, in May, a US Citizenship and Immigration Services memo implied that people who could previously apply for a green card from inside the US may now have to leave the country while their case is being processed.

And this week, the administration introduced a new rule that puts an expiration date on how long people on student visas can initially stay in the US.

Salakhutdinov, however, said that while the US immigration process can be intimidating and "uncertain," Yang was always set on going back to China and building his own startup.

"I remember him telling me that if he didn't at least try starting his own company, he would regret it for the rest of his life. I respect that, and he was right," Salakhutdinov wrote on X.

Read next

Lakshmi Varanasi

sentences.zh: 其编码和代理能力可与 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 等实验室的美国领先模型相媲美，而且成本要低得多，标志着中国在人工智能竞赛中的一个新里程碑。

sentences.en: Who is Yang Zhilin?

blocks.html_en: Yang was born in 1992 in Shantou, a city in China's Guangdong province. He attended Tsinghua University before earning a Ph.D. at Carnegie Mellon University in Pennsylvania, where he studied under prominent AI researchers Ruslan Salakhutdinov and William Cohen.

sentences.zh: 杨1992年出生于中国广东省汕头市。

sentences.en: He attended Tsinghua University before earning a Ph.D.
sentences.zh: 在获得博士学位之前，他曾就读于清华大学。

sentences.en: at Carnegie Mellon University in Pennsylvania, where he studied under prominent AI researchers Ruslan Salakhutdinov and William Cohen.
sentences.zh: 在宾夕法尼亚州卡内基梅隆大学，他师从著名人工智能研究人员 Ruslan Salakhutdinov 和 William Cohen。

blocks.html_en: "He is absolutely brilliant," Salakhutdinov said of Yang in a post on X on Friday. In another post, Salakhutdinov said that after his graduation, Yang was heavily recruited by Big Tech but was committed to starting his own company.

sentences.en: "He is absolutely brilliant," Salakhutdinov said of Yang in a post on X on Friday.
sentences.zh: “他绝对是一位才华横溢的人，”萨拉胡迪诺夫周五在 X 上的一篇帖子中这样评价杨。

sentences.en: In another post, Salakhutdinov said that after his graduation, Yang was heavily recruited by Big Tech but was committed to starting his own company.
sentences.zh: Salakhutdinov 在另一篇文章中表示，毕业后，杨被大型科技公司大量聘用，但他致力于创办自己的公司。

blocks.html_en: While at Carnegie Mellon, Yang interned at Google Brain and Meta. He's also coauthored several research papers on topics ranging from limitations in how language models handle context to prompt-tuning advice.

sentences.en: While at Carnegie Mellon, Yang interned at Google Brain and Meta.
sentences.zh: 在卡内基梅隆大学期间，杨曾在 Google Brain 和 Meta 实习。

sentences.en: He's also coauthored several research papers on topics ranging from limitations in how language models handle context to prompt-tuning advice.
sentences.zh: 他还与人合着了几篇研究论文，主题涵盖从语言模型处理上下文的局限性到及时调整建议等。

blocks.html_en: Before launching Moonshot AI, Yang returned to China and contributed to several major AI projects, including Huawei's PanGu model and the Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence's Wu Dao, a large-scale multimodal AI model. He also cofounded Recurrent AI, a startup that used artificial intelligence to analyze sales conversations and help companies improve their performance.

sentences.en: Before launching Moonshot AI, Yang returned to China and contributed to several major AI projects, including Huawei's PanGu model and the Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence's Wu Dao, a large-scale multimodal AI model.
sentences.zh: 在推出Moonshot AI之前，杨回国并为多个重大人工智能项目做出了贡献，包括华为的盘古模型和北京人工智能研究院的大型多模态人工智能模型无道。

sentences.en: He also cofounded Recurrent AI, a startup that used artificial intelligence to analyze sales conversations and help companies improve their performance.
sentences.zh: 他还共同创立了 Recurrent AI，这是一家利用人工智能分析销售对话并帮助公司提高绩效的初创公司。

blocks.html_en: One of Yang's principles in building AI is to lean toward scale.

sentences.en: One of Yang's principles in building AI is to lean toward scale.
sentences.zh: 杨构建人工智能的原则之一是倾向于规模化。

blocks.html_en: "If you can solve it with scale, don't solve it with a new algorithm. The new algorithm's value is to enable better scaling," he told journalist Xiaojun Zhang in an interview published on LinkedIn.

sentences.en: "If you can solve it with scale, don't solve it with a new algorithm.
sentences.zh: “如果你能用规模来解决它，就不要用新算法来解决它。

sentences.en: The new algorithm's value is to enable better scaling," he told journalist Xiaojun Zhang in an interview published on LinkedIn.
sentences.zh: 新算法的价值在于实现更好的扩展，”他在 LinkedIn 上发表的采访中告诉记者张晓军。

blocks.html_en: He helped start Moonshot AI in early 2023. The team behind the company had developed multiple AI technologies, including Transformer-XL, RoPE, Group Normalization, ShuffleNet, MuonClip, and Mooncake.

sentences.en: He helped start Moonshot AI in early 2023.
sentences.zh: 他于 2023 年初帮助创立了 Moonshot AI。

sentences.en: The team behind the company had developed multiple AI technologies, including Transformer-XL, RoPE, Group Normalization, ShuffleNet, MuonClip, and Mooncake.
sentences.zh: 该公司背后的团队开发了多项人工智能技术，包括 Transformer-XL、RoPE、Group Normalization、ShuffleNet、MuonClip 和 Mooncake。

blocks.html_en: Moonshot AI's first claim to fame was giving its Kimi K2 foundation model an unusually large context window — a trillion parameters — to process lengthy documents. Moonshot also has an AI assistant product, Kimi, and has since expanded into coding, research, and autonomous AI agents, attracting backing from Alibaba, Tencent, and other major Chinese investors.

sentences.en: Moonshot AI's first claim to fame was giving its Kimi K2 foundation model an unusually large context window — a trillion parameters — to process lengthy documents.
sentences.zh: Moonshot AI 首次声名鹊起是为其 Kimi K2 基础模型提供了异常大的上下文窗口（一万亿个参数）来处理冗长的文档。

sentences.en: Moonshot also has an AI assistant product, Kimi, and has since expanded into coding, research, and autonomous AI agents, attracting backing from Alibaba, Tencent, and other major Chinese investors.
sentences.zh: Moonshot 还拥有一款人工智能助手产品 Kimi，此后已扩展到编码、研究和自主人工智能代理领域，吸引了阿里巴巴、腾讯和其他中国主要投资者的支持。

blocks.html_en: Kimi K3 has now catapulted both Moonshot AI and its founder onto the global stage.

sentences.en: Kimi K3 has now catapulted both Moonshot AI and its founder onto the global stage.
sentences.zh: Kimi K3 现已将 Moonshot AI 及其创始人推上了全球舞台。

blocks.html_en: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch said Kimi K3 marked "the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark," in a post on X. While Wharton professor Ethan Mollick called it "closest to the frontier yet."

sentences.en: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch said Kimi K3 marked "the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark," in a post on X.
sentences.zh: Vercel 首席执行官 Guillermo Rauch 在 X 上发表的一篇文章中表示，Kimi K3 标志着“开放模型首次在这个全面的网络工程基准测试中领先于所有专有模型”。

sentences.en: While Wharton professor Ethan Mollick called it "closest to the frontier yet."
sentences.zh: 沃顿商学院教授伊森·莫里克（Ethan Mollick）称其为“迄今为止最接近前沿的”。

blocks.html_en: "The ultimate AGI company will dwarf today's giants — double, triple the scale. Not necessarily OpenAI, but such a company will exist," Yang said in his interview with Zhang.

sentences.en: "The ultimate AGI company will dwarf today's giants — double, triple the scale.
sentences.zh: “最终的 AGI 公司将使当今的巨头相形见绌——规模扩大一倍、三倍。

sentences.en: Not necessarily OpenAI, but such a company will exist," Yang said in his interview with Zhang.
sentences.zh: 不一定是OpenAI，但这样的公司一定会存在。”杨在接受张的采访时说道。

blocks.html_en: Why Yan Zhilin left the US

sentences.en: Why Yan Zhilin left the US
sentences.zh: 颜值琳为何离开美国

blocks.html_en: Some leading tech figures lamented after Kimi K3's release this week that Yang didn't remain in the United States to work at an American AI lab. Legendary billionaire investor Vinod Khosla blamed the Trump administration's restrictive immigration policies.

sentences.en: Some leading tech figures lamented after Kimi K3's release this week that Yang didn't remain in the United States to work at an American AI lab.
sentences.zh: 本周 Kimi K3 发布后，一些领先的科技人士对杨没有留在美国在美国人工智能实验室工作表示遗憾。

sentences.en: Legendary billionaire investor Vinod Khosla blamed the Trump administration's restrictive immigration policies.
sentences.zh: 传奇亿万富翁投资者维诺德·科斯拉指责特朗普政府限制性移民政策。

blocks.html_en: "Even bigger issue is the brilliant talent we are scaring away from other countries with our immigration policies for great talent," he said in response to the news of Kimi K3's success.

sentences.en: "Even bigger issue is the brilliant talent we are scaring away from other countries with our immigration policies for great talent," he said in response to the news of Kimi K3's success.
sentences.zh: “更大的问题是，我们的优秀人才移民政策正在从其他国家吓走优秀人才，”他在回应 Kimi K3 成功的消息时说道。

blocks.html_en: The Trump administration has moved to tighten immigration restrictions, including for student visas. Last year, the government introduced a $100,000 fee for employers sponsoring some new H-1B applications for foreign workers. The ruling was later struck down by a federal judge and remains in litigation.

sentences.en: The Trump administration has moved to tighten immigration restrictions, including for student visas.
sentences.zh: 特朗普政府已采取行动收紧移民限制，包括学生签证。

sentences.en: Last year, the government introduced a $100,000 fee for employers sponsoring some new H-1B applications for foreign workers.
sentences.zh: 去年，政府向为外国工人赞助一些新的 H-1B 申请的雇主收取 10 万美元的费用。

sentences.en: The ruling was later struck down by a federal judge and remains in litigation.
sentences.zh: 该裁决后来被联邦法官推翻，目前仍在诉讼中。

blocks.html_en: Then, in May, a US Citizenship and Immigration Services memo implied that people who could previously apply for a green card from inside the US may now have to leave the country while their case is being processed.

sentences.en: Then, in May, a US Citizenship and Immigration Services memo implied that people who could previously apply for a green card from inside the US may now have to leave the country while their case is being processed.
sentences.zh: 然后，在五月份，美国公民和移民服务局的一份备忘录暗示，以前可以从美国境内申请绿卡的人现在可能必须在案件处理期间离开该国。

blocks.html_en: And this week, the administration introduced a new rule that puts an expiration date on how long people on student visas can initially stay in the US.

sentences.en: And this week, the administration introduced a new rule that puts an expiration date on how long people on student visas can initially stay in the US.
sentences.zh: 本周，政府推出了一项新规定，规定持学生签证的人最初可以在美国停留的期限。

blocks.html_en: Salakhutdinov, however, said that while the US immigration process can be intimidating and "uncertain," Yang was always set on going back to China and building his own startup.

sentences.en: Salakhutdinov, however, said that while the US immigration process can be intimidating and "uncertain," Yang was always set on going back to China and building his own startup.
sentences.zh: 然而，萨拉胡迪诺夫表示，虽然美国的移民程序可能令人生畏且“不确定”，但杨始终决心回到中国并建立自己的初创公司。

blocks.html_en: "I remember him telling me that if he didn't at least try starting his own company, he would regret it for the rest of his life. I respect that, and he was right," Salakhutdinov wrote on X.

sentences.en: "I remember him telling me that if he didn't at least try starting his own company, he would regret it for the rest of his life.
sentences.zh: “我记得他告诉我，如果他不至少尝试创办自己的公司，他会后悔一辈子。

sentences.en: I respect that, and he was right," Salakhutdinov wrote on X.
sentences.zh: 我尊重这一点，他是对的，”萨拉胡迪诺夫在 X 上写道。

作者：Lakshmi Varanasi 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

在人工智能行业掀起波澜的创始人并不是埃隆·马斯克、山姆·奥尔特曼或达里奥·阿莫迪这样的美国科技亿万富翁。

杨志林是 34 岁的研究员和企业家，是中国公司 Moonshot AI 及其新的开放权重 Kimi K3 AI 模型的幕后黑手，该模型本周引起了硅谷的关注。

Kimi K3 是来自中国的最新热门开放式重量型号。 其编码和代理能力可与 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 等实验室的美国领先模型相媲美，而且成本要低得多，标志着中国在人工智能竞赛中的一个新里程碑。

Who is Yang Zhilin?

杨1992年出生于中国广东省汕头市。 在获得博士学位之前，他曾就读于清华大学。 在宾夕法尼亚州卡内基梅隆大学，他师从著名人工智能研究人员 Ruslan Salakhutdinov 和 William Cohen。

“他绝对是一位才华横溢的人，”萨拉胡迪诺夫周五在 X 上的一篇帖子中这样评价杨。 Salakhutdinov 在另一篇文章中表示，毕业后，杨被大型科技公司大量聘用，但他致力于创办自己的公司。

在卡内基梅隆大学期间，杨曾在 Google Brain 和 Meta 实习。 他还与人合着了几篇研究论文，主题涵盖从语言模型处理上下文的局限性到及时调整建议等。

在推出Moonshot AI之前，杨回国并为多个重大人工智能项目做出了贡献，包括华为的盘古模型和北京人工智能研究院的大型多模态人工智能模型无道。 他还共同创立了 Recurrent AI，这是一家利用人工智能分析销售对话并帮助公司提高绩效的初创公司。

杨构建人工智能的原则之一是倾向于规模化。

“如果你能用规模来解决它，就不要用新算法来解决它。 新算法的价值在于实现更好的扩展，”他在 LinkedIn 上发表的采访中告诉记者张晓军。

他于 2023 年初帮助创立了 Moonshot AI。 该公司背后的团队开发了多项人工智能技术，包括 Transformer-XL、RoPE、Group Normalization、ShuffleNet、MuonClip 和 Mooncake。

Moonshot AI 首次声名鹊起是为其 Kimi K2 基础模型提供了异常大的上下文窗口（一万亿个参数）来处理冗长的文档。 Moonshot 还拥有一款人工智能助手产品 Kimi，此后已扩展到编码、研究和自主人工智能代理领域，吸引了阿里巴巴、腾讯和其他中国主要投资者的支持。

Kimi K3 现已将 Moonshot AI 及其创始人推上了全球舞台。

Vercel 首席执行官 Guillermo Rauch 在 X 上发表的一篇文章中表示，Kimi K3 标志着“开放模型首次在这个全面的网络工程基准测试中领先于所有专有模型”。 沃顿商学院教授伊森·莫里克（Ethan Mollick）称其为“迄今为止最接近前沿的”。

“最终的 AGI 公司将使当今的巨头相形见绌——规模扩大一倍、三倍。 不一定是OpenAI，但这样的公司一定会存在。”杨在接受张的采访时说道。

颜值琳为何离开美国

本周 Kimi K3 发布后，一些领先的科技人士对杨没有留在美国在美国人工智能实验室工作表示遗憾。 传奇亿万富翁投资者维诺德·科斯拉指责特朗普政府限制性移民政策。

“更大的问题是，我们的优秀人才移民政策正在从其他国家吓走优秀人才，”他在回应 Kimi K3 成功的消息时说道。

特朗普政府已采取行动收紧移民限制，包括学生签证。 去年，政府向为外国工人赞助一些新的 H-1B 申请的雇主收取 10 万美元的费用。 该裁决后来被联邦法官推翻，目前仍在诉讼中。

然后，在五月份，美国公民和移民服务局的一份备忘录暗示，以前可以从美国境内申请绿卡的人现在可能必须在案件处理期间离开该国。

本周，政府推出了一项新规定，规定持学生签证的人最初可以在美国停留的期限。

然而，萨拉胡迪诺夫表示，虽然美国的移民程序可能令人生畏且“不确定”，但杨始终决心回到中国并建立自己的初创公司。

“我记得他告诉我，如果他不至少尝试创办自己的公司，他会后悔一辈子。 我尊重这一点，他是对的，”萨拉胡迪诺夫在 X 上写道。
